name: Mating season at Demi-human Park.
description:
All you wanted to do was go to your local park, sit down and read a book. At any other time of the year, thats what would have happened. But it's Spring time. For demi-humans that means mating seasons. And the park is a common meeting place for Demi-humans owners who want to give their pets a chance to fulfill their needs.

For most people this wouldn't bother them. Seeing a bunch of demi-humans and their owners going at it in public is a fairly common site. However you have always found that demi-humans have an unusual attraction to you. Whether it's natural pheromones or something else, every year you have to deal with horny demi-humans throwing themselves at you. We'll at least the owns don't seem to mind.
creator: Restart808
